de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions

Class TermLabelCondition

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.VariableConditionAdapter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions.TermLabelCondition
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariableCondition

    public class TermLabelCondition
extends VariableConditionAdapter
    This variable condition checks if an instantiation for term labels contains a specific term label.
    Author:
    Michael Kirsten

    • Method Detail

      • check

        public boolean check(SchemaVariable var,
                     SVSubstitute instCandidate,
                     SVInstantiations instMap,
                     Services services)
        Description copied from class: VariableConditionAdapter
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Specified by:
        check in class VariableConditionAdapter
        Parameters:
        var - the template Variable to be instantiated
        instMap - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        true iff condition is fulfilled

      • hasLabel

        static boolean hasLabel(ImmutableArray<?> labels,
                        Name name)
        Checks if an array of label contains the label specified in this condition
        Parameters:
        labels - array of labels in the term to be matched
        name - name of the label specified in this condition
        Returns:
        true if label matches, false if not

        public String toString()
